coaches.name: Bibb Falk
principles: Fundamentals-first: every player masters the basics before advanced techniques.
Recruit Texas-first: build a regional identity into a national brand.
Consistency over flash: process beats outcome in any single game.

coaches.name: Cliff Gustafson
principles: Maximum effort on every pitch — effort is non-negotiable.
Team-first culture: individual statistics are subordinate to winning.
Pitching depth is the cornerstone of a championship rotation.
Discipline and accountability: hold every player to the same standard.
Speed and defense create run-prevention; offense creates opportunity.

coaches.name: Augie Garrido
principles: Mental toughness is trainable — build it every day.
Play the game within the game: situational awareness over raw athleticism.
Every at-bat is a battle; compete with full presence.
Develop players for life, not just for baseball.
Omaha is the destination; every decision must point toward the College World Series.

coaches.name: David Pierce
principles: Elite player development: recruit high-ceiling athletes and accelerate growth.
Analytics-informed decision-making without losing player instinct.
Compete in the toughest competition — Big 12 then SEC era.
Championship culture is built in the offseason.
Adaptability: the SEC transition demands upgraded preparation and scouting.
